title: 愛我的人和我愛的人
research_summary: 游鴻明的這首歌以抒情慢板的形式表達了失戀後的無奈與哀傷，帶有淡淡的憂鬱和深深的思考。
visual_style: monochrome and muted tones, with elements of melancholy and introspection
background_prompt: A dimly lit room with a large window overlooking an empty street at dusk, rain lightly falling outside. The inside is sparsely decorated with few personal items.
outfit_prompt: An anime character wearing simple and dark clothing, such as a loose black t-shirt and jeans, possibly with a faded grey jacket or hoodie over it
scene_description: MV中的場景應該是一個昏暗的房間，內有大窗戶對外望著空無一人的街道，在雨天時光線微弱。室內裝飾簡樸，僅有少量物品能透露主人心情，如未讀完的書籍和散落的照片。角色則穿著簡單又帶點淒涼氣息的衣服，呈現出一種低調哀愁的形象。
